skills.name: device_qa_workflow
skills.description: This is the highest-priority orchestration skill. When you receive a user question about NI hardware devices, you MUST load and follow this workflow before doing anything else.

skills.name: dcpower_user_manual
skills.description: NI-DCPower category-level User Manual — covers common concepts, programming, and usage for ALL dcpower-category devices (PXIe-4135, PXIe-4147, PXIe-4163, etc.).

skills.name: pxie_4163_user_manual
skills.description: PXIe-4163 device-specific User Manual — official documentation.

skills.name: pxie_4135_user_manual
skills.description: PXIe-4135 device-specific User Manual — official documentation.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_attributes_advanced
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Attributes: Advanced. Advanced session/channel attributes including active advanced sequence, auxiliary power source, isolation state, interlock state, power source, power source in use, and self-calibration persistence.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_attributes_device_specific
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Attributes: Device Specific. Device-specific attributes such as cable length for LCR-capable instruments.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_attributes_events
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Attributes: Events. Event attributes for Measure Complete Event, Pulse Complete Event, Sequence Engine Done Event, and Source Complete Event — including output terminal, pulse polarity, pulse width, and high-level function references.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_attributes_inherent_ivi
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Attributes: Inherent IVI. Inherent IVI attributes (driver setup, group capabilities, instrument firmware/manufacturer/model, logical name, specific driver description/prefix/revision/vendor, supported instrument models) and User Options (cache, interchange check, query instrument status, range check, record coercions, simulate, driver setup).

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_attributes_lcr
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Attributes: LCR. LCR measurement attributes (AC dither, AC stimulus frequency, current/voltage range, aperture time, DC bias, impedance auto range, impedance range, load capacitance, load inductance, load resistance, measurement time, open/short/load compensation, source delay mode) and instrument mode.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_attributes_measure
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Attributes: Measure. Measurement configuration attributes including autorange, autorange behavior, aperture time/units/auto-mode, compliance limit autorange, DC noise rejection, measure buffer size, measure when, measure record length/delta time, power line frequency, samples to average, and sense (local/remote). Also includes Measure Trigger attributes (digital edge trigger input/edge).

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_attributes_source
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Attributes: Source. Source configuration attributes (conduction voltage, compliance limits, current/voltage level & range, output cutoff/enabled/function/resistance, overranging, source delay, source mode, transient response), Constant Power attributes (power limit, compensation, gain bandwidth, pole-zero ratio), DC Voltage/Current attributes, Pulse Voltage/Current attributes, and Trigger configuration attributes (Measure/Pulse/Sequence Advance/Shutdown/Source/Start trigger input/edge/type).

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_attributes_supported
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Attributes: Supported Attributes by Device. Per-device tables listing default values and support status for all attributes across PXI-4110, PXI-4130, PXI-4132, PXIe-4112/4113, PXIe-4135, PXIe-4136/4137, PXIe-4138/4139, PXIe-4140/4141, PXIe-4142/4143, PXIe-4144/4145, PXIe-4147, PXIe-4150/4151, PXIe-4154, PXIe-4162/4163, and PXIe-4190.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_calibration
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Calibration. Calibration function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_CalAdjustCurrentLimit, CalAdjustCurrentMeasurement, CalAdjustInternalReference, CalAdjustOutputResistance, CalAdjustResidualCurrentOffset, CalAdjustResidualVoltageOffset, CalAdjustVoltageLevel, CalAdjustVoltageMeasurement, CalSelfCalibrate, ChangeExtCalPassword, CloseExtCal, ConnectInternalReference, InitExtCal. Also includes LCR Compensation functions (GetLCRCompensationData, GetLCRCompensationLastDateAndTime, ConfigureLCRCompensation, PerformLCROpenCustomCableCompensation, PerformLCROpen/Short/LoadCompensation, PerformLCRShortCustomCableCompensation).

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_control
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Control. Control function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_Abort, AbortWithChannels, Commit, CommitWithChannels, Initiate, and InitiateWithChannels.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_init_close
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Initialize/Close. Session lifecycle function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_close and niDCPower_InitializeWithIndependentChannels.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_measure
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Measure. Measurement function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_ConfigureApertureTime, ConfigurePowerLineFrequency, FetchMultiple, FetchMultipleWithChannels, Measure, MeasureMultiple, MeasureMultipleWithChannels, and ConfigureOutputEnabled.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_query
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Query. Query function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_ClearLatchedOutputCutoffState, QueryLatchedOutputCutoffState, QueryMaxCurrentLimit, QueryMaxVoltageLevel, QueryMinCurrentLimit, QueryOutputState.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_set_get_attribute
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Set/Get Attribute. Attribute accessor function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_GetAttributeViBoolean/ViInt32/ViInt64/ViReal64/ViString and niDCPower_SetAttributeViBoolean/ViInt32/ViInt64/ViReal64/ViString.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_source
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Source. Source configuration function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_CreateAdvancedSequence, CreateAdvancedSequenceStep, CreateAdvancedSequenceWithChannels, DeleteAdvancedSequence, SetSequence, ConfigureSourceMode; DC Current functions (ConfigureCurrentLevel, ConfigureCurrentLevelRange, ConfigureVoltageLimit, ConfigureVoltageLimitRange); DC Voltage functions (ConfigureVoltageLevel, ConfigureVoltageLevelRange, ConfigureCurrentLimit, ConfigureCurrentLimitRange); Pulse Current/Voltage functions.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_supported
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Supported Functions by Device. Per-device tables listing function support status across PXI-4110, PXIe-4051, PXIe-4112/4113, PXI-4130, PXI-4132, PXIe-4135, PXIe-4136/4137, PXIe-4138/4139, PXIe-4140/4141/4142/4143/4144/4145, PXIe-4147, PXIe-4150/4151, PXIe-4154, PXIe-4162/4163, PXIe-4190.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_triggers_events
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Triggers and Events. Trigger and event function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_ConfigureDigitalEdgeMeasureTrigger, ConfigureDigitalEdgePulseTrigger, ConfigureDigitalEdgeSequenceAdvanceTrigger, ConfigureDigitalEdgeShutdownTrigger, ConfigureDigitalEdgeSourceTrigger, ConfigureDigitalEdgeStartTrigger, ConfigureSoftwareEdge*Trigger, Disable*Trigger, SendSoftwareEdgeTrigger, ExportSignal, WaitForEvent.

skills.name: dcpower_c_api_functions_utility
skills.description: NI-DCPower C API — Functions: Utility. Utility and IVI function signatures and parameters including niDCPower_ClearError, Disable, ErrorMessage, ExportAttributeConfigurationBuffer/File, ImportAttributeConfigurationBuffer/File, ResetDevice, ResetWithChannels, GetError, error_query, reset, revision_query, self_test, ConfigureOVP, ClearInterchangeWarnings, GetNextCoercionRecord, GetNextInterchangeWarning, ResetInterchangeCheck, ResetOutputProtection.
